checked_paths: all audited dependency repos searched for the listed symbols
negative_search_evidence.missing_behavior: No local audited repo handles ExecutorWentOffline(address indexed paymentAddress) logs or rejects malformed logs missing topic[1]; the only deactivation method is an in-memory helper with no event dispatch caller.
related_but_insufficient_code: ritual-spc-verification/src/types.rs still defines ExecutorRegistry and deactivate_executor, but it is only an in-memory map and has no log-watching service.
ritual-tee-registry-reader reads TEEServiceRegistry storage via TEE_SERVICE_REGISTRY_CONTRACT_ADDRESS; it does not decode ExecutorRegistry event logs.

ritual-reth-nodebuilder-internal/crates/node/src/executor.rs syncs registry state from storage before execution but uses TEE_SERVICE_REGISTRY_CONTRACT_ADDRESS and read_all_executors, not ExecutorRegistry event receipts.

notes: Confirmed by exact symbol searches across all audited local repos and by reading the current SPC/TEE registry code paths.
rationale: The primary diff changes the event signature and dispatch arm from ExecutorDeactivated to ExecutorWentOffline and rewrites the handler to extract paymentAddress from topic[1]. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: ExecutorWentOffline(address indexed paymentAddress) must replace ExecutorDeactivated handling, and the service must mark the executor for topic[1]'s paymentAddress offline while rejecting logs missing that topic.
suggested_falsification_tests: Register an executor in the service registry, process an ExecutorWentOffline log whose indexed paymentAddress is that executor, and assert it is no longer active; process the old ExecutorDeactivated signature or a log without topic[1] and assert the old signature is ignored or the malformed new log errors without unintended deactivation.
summary: ExecutorWentOffline event handling is absent from the audited local repos.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Register an executor then process an ExecutorWentOffline log; the current local code has no handler to process that log or deactivate by payment address.
title: ExecutorWentOffline deactivates payment address
